Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for specialist-level ISO 8000 Data Administrator.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, DDaT signal (0.438), and Data Governance handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Governance appears in 50-80% of ISO 8000 Data Administrator job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at specialist level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Governance at composite 0.438 is market-validated for ISO 8000 Data Administrator. Final decision: include.
